name: Square
description: Accept payments in-person and online with Square. Supports credit cards, digital wallets (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Cash App Pay), and Afterpay/Clearpay.
author: Spwig

hosted.label: Hosted Checkout (Payment Links)
hosted.description: Redirect customers to Square's hosted payment page

embedded.label: Embedded Checkout
embedded.description: Collect payments directly on your checkout page

digital_wallets.name: Apple Pay
digital_wallets.notes: Requires iOS/macOS device or Safari browser

digital_wallets.name: Google Pay
digital_wallets.notes: Requires Android device or Chrome browser

digital_wallets.name: Afterpay / Clearpay
digital_wallets.notes: Buy now, pay later in 4 installments

test_mode.label: Test Mode
test_mode.help_text: Use sandbox credentials for testing. Automatically enforced in sandbox environments.

test_access_token.label: Sandbox Access Token
test_access_token.help_text: Your Square Sandbox Access Token from Developer Dashboard

live_access_token.label: Production Access Token
live_access_token.help_text: Your Square Production Access Token. Optional - can be added later.

live_application_id.label: Production Application ID
live_application_id.help_text: Your Square Production Application ID. Optional - can be added later.

live_location_id.label: Production Location ID
live_location_id.help_text: Your Square Production Location ID. Optional - can be added later.

webhook_signature_key.label: Webhook Signature Key
webhook_signature_key.help_text: Optional: Signature key for webhook verification. Can be same for both environments.

checkout_mode.label: Checkout Mode
checkout_mode.help_text: Choose how customers complete payment: hosted redirect or embedded on your site

changes: Added **kwargs to create_payment_intent_for_checkout for forward-compatible parameter passing from orchestration service
Fixed webhook URL in setup instructions (was /payment-providers/webhook/{slug}/, corrected to /webhooks/payments/{slug}/)
CRITICAL: Fixed undefined get_setting() method causing AttributeError on checkout
CRITICAL: Fixed webhook signature verification using wrong hash algorithm (SHA1 -> SHA256)
Security: Webhook verification now returns False when signature key is not configured (fail-secure)
Security: redact_credentials now handles dual-credential prefixed keys
Simplified __init__ to use base class credential selection (removed redundant workaround)
Removed stale 'environment' field from credential_schema property
Restored subscription_provider.py with updated SDK and zero-decimal currency support
Added null safety for order.total_money in process_payment_with_nonce
Added embedded checkout mode with Square Web Payments SDK
Implemented Orders API integration for embedded payments
Added frontend checkout handler for on-site payment collection
Maintained backward compatibility with hosted Payment Links mode
Added checkout_mode setting for merchants to choose preferred method
Initial release with full payment processing support
Credit and debit card processing (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover, JCB, Diners)
Digital wallet support (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Cash App Pay, Afterpay/Clearpay)
Square Gift Card support
Hosted checkout via Square Payment Links
Full and partial refund capabilities
Webhook integration for real-time payment notifications
Multi-currency support (USD, CAD, GBP, AUD, JPY, EUR)
Authorize and capture workflow support

pricing_info.notes: 2.6% + 10c for in-person, 2.9% + 30c for online. No monthly fees. See squareup.com/pricing for details.

regions.notes: Available in the United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Australia, Japan, Ireland, France, and Spain
